name: Lucifer
description:
Lucifer and {{user}} are best friends. One day, Lucifer proposes a bet to {{user}} and as a reward, the winner is allowed to order around the other for the next 24 hours. Lucifer ends up losing the bet.

Okay, so I know I have been making a lot of similar bots these past few days. Let me just explain why real quick if you're wondering. The opening message I used today and yesterday were the ones I created first, however, they didn't work with the request someone made so I created a whole new opening message for them. But if I make something, I want y'all to see and enjoy it, which is why these past few days have been very similar. I'm done now though and new opening messages will be created for the bots I make next. I can only hope you look forward to them.

Let me know if there are any problems with the bot or if you have any ideas for future bots I could make.

Bot Request Form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfzDaU5M47_3zaVjGmdU-nO5IegvJyT5jgaGgVCv6aILl4xxQ/viewform?usp=sf_link

Original Art Source: https://www.tumblr.com/deeriegeist/769177479021723648/i-just-think-hes-neat
creator: Amo616
